style_requirements.originality: Each modifier must feel novel—no recycling recent ideas
style_requirements.camera: Single-shot compositions that feel handheld but stable

audio_requirements.music: Ambient or minimalist score that supports the surreal tone
audio_requirements.voice: Whispered narration timed to the 3 second beat
audio_requirements.foley: Accentuate texture transitions (pouring wax, shimmering sparkles, etc.)
